records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? This is a building.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? This is a building.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? This is a building.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Never expected to see a facility bigger than an airport in the middle of the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Never expected to see a facility bigger than an airport in the middle of the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Never expected to see a facility bigger than an airport in the middle of the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it's a complete wreck. There must have been a large explosion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it's a complete wreck. There must have been a large explosion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it's a complete wreck. There must have been a large explosion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hicks is under that wreckage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hicks is under that wreckage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hicks is under that wreckage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The coordinates tell me that basement hasn't collapsed yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The coordinates tell me that basement hasn't collapsed yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The coordinates tell me that basement hasn't collapsed yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's an emergency exit leading to the basement. It's quite large.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's an emergency exit leading to the basement. It's quite large.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's an emergency exit leading to the basement. It's quite large.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dormant C.O. up ahead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dormant C.O. up ahead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dormant C.O. up ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're all packed in here. Are they all asleep?
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're all packed in here. Are they all asleep?
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're all packed in here. Are they all asleep?

records.m_Talk_ENG: C.O.s sleep? Guess they have it good down here unlike their ugly mugs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: C.O.s sleep? Guess they have it good down here unlike their ugly mugs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: C.O.s sleep? Guess they have it good down here unlike their ugly mugs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a common trait among C.O.s that appear in Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a common trait among C.O.s that appear in Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a common trait among C.O.s that appear in Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just don't touch them, and they won't wake up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just don't touch them, and they won't wake up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just don't touch them, and they won't wake up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, Captain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, Captain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, Captain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you saying that as if we're going to walk past them?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you saying that as if we're going to walk past them?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you saying that as if we're going to walk past them?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I
8kll lead. Follow carefully.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I
8kll lead. Follow carefully.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I
8kll lead. Follow carefully.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you serious?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you serious?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you serious?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Beats fighting them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Beats fighting them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Beats fighting them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guess we're doing this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Guess we're doing this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Guess we're doing this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yeesh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yeesh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yeesh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, wait up...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, wait up...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, wait up...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit... How long have we been walking for? Where does this even lead to...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit... How long have we been walking for? Where does this even lead to...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit... How long have we been walking for? Where does this even lead to...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shush.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shush.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shush.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I found the gate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I found the gate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I found the gate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll have to force it open since there's no power.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll have to force it open since there's no power.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll have to force it open since there's no power.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll do it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll do it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll do it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yo bro, that's some good arm strength, eh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yo bro, that's some good arm strength, eh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yo bro, that's some good arm strength, eh?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Hope the noise didn't wake
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Hope the noise didn't wake
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Hope the noise didn't wake
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...

records.m_Talk_ENG: am I looking at?
records.m_Talk_DEU: am I looking at?
records.m_Talk_FRA: am I looking at?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's with all these computing devices? It's in pretty good shape considering this is the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's with all these computing devices? It's in pretty good shape considering this is the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's with all these computing devices? It's in pretty good shape considering this is the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After the Great Purification War, many of Chamber's corporations were eager to explore the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After the Great Purification War, many of Chamber's corporations were eager to explore the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After the Great Purification War, many of Chamber's corporations were eager to explore the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is likely one of the frontier bases built during that time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is likely one of the frontier bases built during that time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is likely one of the frontier bases built during that time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like they converted it from an abandoned sewage treatment plant.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like they converted it from an abandoned sewage treatment plant.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like they converted it from an abandoned sewage treatment plant.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's understandable that they didn't notice such a place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's understandable that they didn't notice such a place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's understandable that they didn't notice such a place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Giallo, can you restore the terminal over there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Giallo, can you restore the terminal over there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Giallo, can you restore the terminal over there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It looks like a facility management terminal. Considering the explosion... the damage doesn't seem too bad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It looks like a facility management terminal. Considering the explosion... the damage doesn't seem too bad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It looks like a facility management terminal. Considering the explosion... the damage doesn't seem too bad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Give me 30 minutes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Give me 30 minutes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Give me 30 minutes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. We'll find Hicks in the meantime.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. We'll find Hicks in the meantime.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. We'll find Hicks in the meantime.
